transcript: You... you... you need do what?
I need to bring you your nectarines.
I say, that's okay. Who am I talking to?
You... uh... have the wrong number.
No, I need to bring you your nectarine.
Hi, I need to bring the nectarines to you.
Aw, sorry, bud... you... I think you do have the wrong number--
'[high tape speed]' Oh, stop acting like an idiot, will ya?
I need to know how you're paying--
We'll see when you get here.
Come on down. How soon are you gonna be here, bud?
You... my fists are gonna be ready.
And I don't think you're gonna like it.
I don't think you're gonna like what's gonna come-- '[beep]' --back, bud!
I'm talking about whippin' you upside your chin, how's that sound?
'[slowed tape speed]' Come on. I said, come on!
You get on down here, and you... you back it up now, bud. And I'll see you in ten minutes, asshole. Name was that ordered these?
Okay, then look at the package and tell me.
I don't got it handy. It's in the truck. But when can I bring it to you? That's all I need left, and how are you gonna pay? That's some of... these things I need to ask.
Go get the-- '[beep]' --package off the truck, man.
If I do that, I'm just gonna drop it on you, with my fists. That's the... that's the bottom line, right there.
Stop the bullshit, man! Go get the package! You're just being an asshole!
No, my fists'll do the talking for me pretty fast.
